stages.name: Whelp
stages.zone: warm cave nursery with amber firelight, moss, furs, a nest of dried grass

stages.name: Pup
stages.zone: tribal hut village at dawn, wooden structures, morning sunlight filtering

stages.name: Adolescent
stages.zone: tribal training ground at dusk, wooden practice dummies, lantern light

stages.name: Warrior
stages.zone: fortified camp at dusk, campfires, distant banners, ruined stone walls

stages.name: Champion

stages.name: Elite
stages.zone: battlefield aftermath, smoke, fallen foes, blood-red dusk sky

stages.name: Warlord
stages.zone: volcanic plateau with dark sky, burning banners, bones scattered

stages.name: Ascendant
stages.zone: ember-strewn ascent to volcanic peak, lava glow, volcanic haze

stages.name: Legendary
stages.zone: throne of bones on a dark volcanic peak, distant army of orc warriors kneeling, blood-red volcanic sky with lightning, burning banners, lava glow reflecting off armour, atmospheric haze, glowing embers drifting

stages.name: Acolyte
stages.zone: acolyte grove with dappled sunlight, woven hammocks, moss-covered stones

stages.name: Archer
stages.zone: a dawnlit archery grove with practice targets, dew-wet leaves, misty morning

stages.name: Warden
stages.zone: moonlit forest edge on patrol, distant owl silhouette, silver fog

stages.name: Templar
stages.zone: fortified grove outpost at dusk, stone pillars with elvish runes, silver lanterns

stages.name: Sage
stages.zone: quiet moonlit grove library, carved stone pedestals with arcane scrolls, dim silver lanterns

stages.zone: outer eldertree grove with towering trees, embedded moonstones, serene twilight

stages.zone: inside an ANCIENT ELDERTREE HALL at night — colossal bioluminescent tree trunks, glowing sigils carved into the bark, ethereal mist, astral water, kneeling elven warriors in background

stages.name: Scraggling
stages.zone: dank underground burrow warren — dim torchlight, piles of rags and bones as a nest, moss and fungus on damp stone walls

stages.name: Snipper
stages.zone: small dim goblin-tribe hovel interior, firelit, bones and rags everywhere

stages.name: Scout
stages.zone: rickety goblin rope-bridge in swamp canopy, dawn light filtering through moss

stages.name: Raider
stages.zone: dusk in a ramshackle swamp-goblin village, stolen banners flapping, torchlight

stages.name: Chief
stages.zone: top of a swampy goblin encampment, rickety watchtowers, campfires, minions bowing

stages.name: Warboss
stages.zone: raid-camp firelit clearing, stolen goods piled, smaller goblins hauling loot

stages.name: Overlord
stages.zone: bandit-camp war tent interior, stolen weapons on racks, firelight, raid-route map on crude wooden table

stages.name: Gloomking
stages.zone: smaller goblin throne carved from dark stone, looted banners, torches

stages.name: Warchief
stages.zone: OBSIDIAN THRONE ROOM piled with looted treasure, MASSIVE DRAGON SKULL mounted on the wall behind, torches in iron sconces, cowering goblin minions in the shadows, bones scattered on the floor
